name: education_port_security_scanner_marrowbridge_ind_col
premise: A shooter drill scheduled tomorrow conflicts with a board meeting where parents promised to bring attorneys. In Education, the situation tagged internally around education port security scanner marrowbridge ind col has converged with local pressure in the Port corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Telemetry and witness accounts diverge; choosing one narrative for speed will discard evidence that may matter in court next month. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. The trade is not abstract: it is individual versus collective under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Elliot Chen
agents.identity: I am Elliot Chen, the accountable executive on this bridge in Education. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat collective as disposable collateral every time individual spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Ravi Rahman
agents.identity: I am Ravi Rahman, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Education. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so individual cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes collective in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect collective.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to collective to secure individual before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Elliot Chen must choose under individual versus collective. What does Elliot Chen do?
